title: Trump announces 2-week Iran ceasefire - suspends bombing
snippet: President Trump announced US agreed to 2-week ceasefire with Iran. Called off bombing and attack for ceasefire period, mentioning Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif and Field Marshal Asim Munin.

title: Iran launches missiles on 5 countries after ceasefire
snippet: BREAKING: Iran has launched missile attacks on FIVE countries just 2 hours after ceasefire went into effect: Israel, UAE, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait

title: Oil crashes 16%, stocks rally on Iran ceasefire
snippet: Trump and Iran agree to a 2-week ceasefire. Oil crashes 16%. Stocks rally.

title: BREAKING: President Trump suspends bombing on Iran for 2 weeks
snippet: BREAKING: President Trump has agreed to suspend bombing on Iran for 2 weeks.

title: Trump threatens Iran - open Strait of Hormuz
snippet: BREAKING: President Trump threatens Iran with living in hell if Strait of Hormuz not opened. Declares Tuesday as power plant and bridge day.

title: Trump will hold military news conference 1PM ET tomorrow
snippet: Trump will hold military news conference tomorrow 1PM ET, 3 hours after 48-hour Iran warning expires.

title: Iran rejected proposed ceasefire - White House called lid
snippet: Iran rejected proposed ceasefire. White House called a lid, Trump not expected publicly for rest of day.

title: Wall Street epic rally - Dow +1100 pts, S&P +2.9%
snippet: Wall Street rallying on ceasefire hopes - Dow up 1100 points, S&P soaring 2.9%

title: Iran will not accept ceasefire - will strike back
snippet: Iran will not accept ceasefire. Iran will strike back and then goodbye power plants and desalination plants in the Gulf.

title: Iran not begging Trump for a deal
snippet: Does not sound like Iran is begging Trump for a deal - something he has previously claimed.

title: Iran launched missiles on 5 countries hours after ceasefire
snippet: Iran has launched missile attacks on FIVE countries, just two hours after the ceasefire went into effect. Israel, UAE, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait.

title: Obama deal had inspectors until Trump ripped it up
snippet: Obama had a deal with Iran to allow inspectors until Trump ripped it up causing all of this.

title: Trump will postpone bombing again for 2 weeks
snippet: Trump will postpone/delay bombing for 2 weeks again. Rinse and repeat.

title: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin
snippet: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. Back to Work.

title: Bitcoin $67,000 on Easter 2026
snippet: Bitcoin Price on Easter 2026: $67,000 (down from $84,500 in 2025 peak)

title: $1.7B returned to Iran was their own money not a gift
snippet: $1.7B was not a gift - returning Iran''s own money. Trump scrapped deal spending ~$1B/day of taxpayer money.
